Fighter type: Archer

Introduced in: Special offer

 

Write a review Send to Discord

Rate this item


description 2/6

When attacking, the Gunslinger has a 30% chance to stun the target of the attack for 1 sec. Also, the Gunslinger gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to the damage dealt by the attack. The shield lasts for up to 5 sec.

description 4/6

When attacking, the Gunslinger has a 40% chance to stun the target of the attack for 1,5 sec. Also, the Gunslinger gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to the damage dealt by the attack. The shield lasts for up to 5 sec. Every second, the Gunslinger takes an extra shot at a random enemy. The shot deals 100% damage. When attacking, the Gunslinger has a 30% chance to take an extra shot at a random enemy. The Gunslinger’s damage is increased by 40% for the duration of the battle. Also, the Gunslinger’s damage increases by 2% every second until the end of the battle. Max damage increase is 20%.

description 6/6

When attacking, the Gunslinger has a 60% chance to petrify the target for 2 sec. During this time, the target can’t move and takes 35% more damage. Also, the Gunslinger gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to the damage dealt by the attack. The shield lasts for up to 2 sec. Every second, the Gunslinger takes an extra shot at a random enemy. The shot deals 120% damage. When attacking, the Gunslinger has a 60% chance to take an extra shot at a random enemy. The Gunslinger’s damage is increased by 70% for the duration of the battle. Also, the Gunslinger’s damage increases by 5% every second until the end of the battle. Max damage increase is 50%. The Gunslinger’s additional shots deals an extra 100000 physical damage to the petrified enemies. When shooting, the Gunslinger has a 60% chance to restore health to themself and all allies in a large radius around them equal to 120% of the Gunslinger’s damage. Once in a while, the Gunslinger fires a piercing bolt at a random enemy. The bolt deals pure damage equal to 300% of the Gunslinger’s attack. The bolt also deals an additional pure damage equal to 20% of the target’s max health.


Substance of Chaos

description 2/6

When an enemy is stunned or petrified by the set ability, the Gunslinger deals additional physical damage to the target equal to 200% of the Gunslinger’s attack.

description 4/6

When an enemy is stunned or petrified by the set ability, the Gunslinger deals additional physical damage to the target equal to 200% of the Gunslinger’s attack. The Gunslinger’s attacks ignore 30% of the target’s armor for the duration of the battle.

description 6/6

When an enemy is stunned or petrified by the set ability, the Gunslinger deals additional physical damage to the target equal to 200% of the Gunslinger’s attack. The Gunslinger’s attacks ignore 30% of the target’s armor for the duration of the battle. Bolt damage from the set ability ignores shields and effects that reduce the target’s damage.


Substance of Greatness

description 2/6

For the duration of the battle, the Gunslinger’s physical and magic armor is increased by 30% for each stunned or petrified enemy.

description 4/6

For the duration of the battle, the Gunslinger’s physical and magic armor is increased by 30% for each stunned or petrified enemy. The Gunslinger’s health is increased by 25% for the duration of the battle. Also, the Gunslinger’s health increases by 3% every second until the end of the battle. The max health increase is equal to 30%.

description 6/6

For the duration of the battle, the Gunslinger’s physical and magic armor is increased by 30% for each stunned or petrified enemy. The Gunslinger’s health is increased by 25% for the duration of the battle. Also, the Gunslinger’s health increases by 3% every second until the end of the battle. The max health increase is equal to 30%. Whenever an enemy or ally is petrified, the Gunslinger restores 10% of their max health. The Gunslinger can’t be petrified.


Substance of Harmony

description 2/6

When an enemy is stunned or petrified by the set ability, the Gunslinger reduces the target’s max health by 30% for 4 sec.

description 4/6

When an enemy is stunned or petrified by the set ability, the Gunslinger reduces the target’s max health by 30% for 4 sec. When attacking, the Gunslinger has a 50% chance to increase the cooldown of the target’s weapon and artifact abilities by 1 sec.

description 6/6

When an enemy is stunned or petrified by the set ability, the Gunslinger reduces the target’s max health by 30% for 4 sec. When attacking, the Gunslinger has a 50% chance to increase the cooldown of the target’s weapon and artifact abilities by 1 sec. When hitting with a bolt from the set ability, the Gunslinger steals 25% of the target’s damage and crit until the next bolt is fired.

Armorcloth
